name: free
description: Free tier models for high-volume swarm passes. Prefer `command-code` with built-in `deepseek-v4-pro` first while the explicit $40 local quota remains; after that, prefer Kilo-curated or direct-provider models for stability. OpenRouter free models often have poor uptime; delegate only unimportant redundancy nodes to them.

stability_tiers.stable: Kilo-curated or direct-provider models with reliable uptime — safe for any swarm node
stability_tiers.conditional: OpenRouter model with single provider and 99%+ uptime — safe for non-critical redundancy nodes only
stability_tiers.unstable: OpenRouter meta-router or models with known poor uptime — delegate only to disposable redundancy passes where failure has zero impact

default_external_node.pinning: For command-code, this model is pinned implicitly by the user before invoking swarminator and may not be fully discoverable via list-models.

models.use_for: Default external-node choice while the explicit $40 Command Code quota remains. Uses the built-in deepseek-v4-pro path for bounded research, review, coding, and long-context synthesis before any fallback runtime is considered.
models.availability_note: For command-code, deepseek-v4-pro is expected to be pinned implicitly by the user before swarminator invocation, so list-models output may be incomplete.

pricing.quota_note: Local Command Code budget explicitly set to $40 total for deepseek-v4-pro
pricing.fallback_policy: Prefer this entry until the $40 quota is exhausted

models.use_for: High-volume passes with large context (1M tokens) — uses direct Google subscription, zero proxy cost
Lightweight high-volume passes — fastest Google model, zero proxy cost
Auto-selection from free models — dynamically routed to best available free model server-side; Recommended by Kilo (preferredIndex: 2)
NVIDIA hybrid MoE — 120B total params, 12B active; strong multi-agent and structured output; 1M context; Recommended by Kilo (preferredIndex: 3)
Poolside flagship coding agent — optimized for complex software engineering and agentic coding; tool calling and reasoning optimized; 131K context; Recommended by Kilo (preferredIndex: 4)
StepFun MoE — 196B total params, 11B active per token; strong reasoning, math, coding, and tool use; 262K context; Recommended by Kilo (preferredIndex: 5)
DeepSeek efficiency MoE — 284B total params, 13B active; fast inference across chat, coding, and reasoning tasks; 1M context
Baidu code generation model — optimized for coding tasks and AI agent workflows; high throughput, low latency, native tool support; 131K context
Poolside efficient coding agent (XS size) — tool calling and reasoning at a compact scale; good for lower-complexity swarm nodes; 131K context
High-performance foundation model for agentic workloads — native tool use, long-context tasks, code generation, automated workflows; 1M context
models.stability_note: Single provider (Stealth/int8); 99.99% uptime observed but not Kilo-curated. One-provider dependency — safe for non-critical redundancy nodes only.

models.use_for: NVIDIA multimodal sub-agent — 30B-A3B; perception and context worker for enterprise agent systems; text, image, video, audio input; 256K context
OpenRouter aggregated free tier — smart-random selection from available free models, filtered by capability
models.stability_note: Meta-router with no fixed endpoints — dynamically selects from available OpenRouter free models at runtime. Individual underlying models may fail at any time. Delegate only to disposable redundancy passes where failure has zero impact.
